known_issues: Selected lane runtime smoke, pullback hash verification, technical QA, and visual QA are complete.
The QA helper is a local-only regression check and does not perform a new live GPU run.
Completed lane proof is not final portfolio, video, audio, or full-project certification.
next_action: Checkpoint completed runtime-smoke evidence and advance to the next lane, module, or deeper QA target without rerunning EC2 for this same proof.
